questionHtml:
In which species does sulfur have the same oxidation state as in SO32–?

A.  S2O32–

B.  SO42–

C.  H2S

D.  SOCl2

meta.title: In which species does sulfur have the same oxidation state as in SO32–? A. S2O32– B. SO42– C. H2S D. SOCl2
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?

Reactivity 3.2.10—Functional groups in organic compounds may undergo reduction. Deduce equations to show reduction of carboxylic acids to primary alcohols via the aldehyde, and reduction of ketones to secondary alcohols.
